description: Fix OAuth 500 errors by implementing proper error handling and configuration validation

steps.name: OAuth Settings Validator
steps.description: Create OAuthSettingsValidator to validate configuration at startup with fail-fast behavior
acceptance_criteria: Application fails to start if required OAuth credentials are missing
Clear error message indicates which credential is missing
Google OAuth is optional - partial config triggers warning
steps.implementation_notes: Add to Infrastructure/Identity, use IHostEnvironment for prod detection. Log warnings for Google OAuth partial config.

steps.name: ProductionOAuthClient Error Handling
steps.description: Modify ProductionOAuthClient to return Result objects instead of throwing exceptions
acceptance_criteria: Unsupported OAuth provider returns failure Result instead of throwing exception
Missing Google credentials returns failure Result instead of throwing exception
steps.implementation_notes: Update IOAuthClient methods to return Result, wrap exceptions

steps.name: GitHub OAuth Flow
steps.description: Implement full GitHub OAuth flow: initiate -> callback -> session
acceptance_criteria: Reader initiating GitHub sign-in is redirected to the authorization page
After successful OAuth, reader session is created
steps.implementation_notes: Use existing endpoints, verify token exchange works with GitHub API

steps.name: Google OAuth Flow
steps.description: Implement full Google OAuth flow: initiate -> callback -> session
acceptance_criteria: Reader initiating Google sign-in is redirected to the authorization page
After successful OAuth, reader session is created
Works when Google credentials are configured
steps.implementation_notes: Similar to GitHub flow, verify OpenID token exchange with Google

steps.name: Error Handling Scenarios
steps.description: Implement graceful error handling for all OAuth error scenarios
acceptance_criteria: Unsupported provider shows user-friendly error instead of crash
Reader denying consent is redirected back without session
Provider errors are handled gracefully with user feedback
quality_gates: All error scenarios return user-friendly error, not crash
steps.implementation_notes: Update endpoints to handle error Results gracefully, redirect with error query param

steps.name: Session Management
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated reader can verify their session status
Reader can sign out and session is cleared
Expired sessions are treated as not authenticated
steps.implementation_notes: Use existing session repository, verify cookie clearing works
